title: ophrys × lefevreana
intro: Ophrys × lefevreana, a hybrid orchid plant, is a rare species resulting from the cross between the Bee Orchid (Ophrys apifera) and the Fly Orchid (Ophrys insectifera). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Ophrys × lefevreana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
